steps.title: Identify the antecedent and required form
steps.content: The blank needs a possessive modifier for “particles.” The antecedent is “the Andromedid meteoroid stream,” which is singular. We need the singular possessive determiner.

steps.title: Apply number agreement to select the correct possessive
steps.content: A possessive determiner must agree in number with its antecedent. “Its” is the singular form that matches. B and C are contractions (“they are,” “it is”), not possessive determiners; A is plural. That matches choice D — D is correct.
